calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Sep-19-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for hearing on name change. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Yvonne Lee. Petitioner was sworn and examined. The Court ordered name change to Jenna Wang. Decree signed.
